Added_Other.mechanism: Stops checking if objects are hidden when they are too far away.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances game performance by reducing unnecessary calculations for distant objects.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagWTTDontPerformOcclusionForOutsideOfRange_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Disables occlusion checks for objects that are too far away from the player.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary calculations for distant objects.

Added_Other.name: FFlagMakeupDontComposeSingleMakeupAsset
Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the combination of individual makeup items into a single asset.
Added_Other.purpose: Gives players more flexibility in customizing their avatars with unique makeup styles.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUnifyCaptures
Added_Other.mechanism: Combines different capture methods into a single system.
Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the process of capturing game events, making it easier for developers to implement features.

Added_World.name: FFlagWTTOcclusionUseMappedNearestTriangle
Added_World.mechanism: Enhances occlusion culling by using the nearest triangle mapping for visibility checks.
Added_World.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing rendering of unseen objects, leading to smoother gameplay.

Removed_World.name: FFlagWTTOcclusionUseMappedNearestTriangle_Staged
Removed_World.mechanism: Optimizes how occlusion culling is performed by using the nearest triangle mapping.
Removed_World.purpose: Reduces rendering load, making games run faster and look better for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUseConvexDecompV8Format_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a new format for handling complex shapes in 3D models.
